positive: Minimalist vector illustration, stylized celestial animal—a graceful, highly stylized wolf or fox silhouette—standing atop a crescent moon. The wolf is depicted in a powerful, elegant pose, howling toward a stylized, abstract galaxy backdrop. Geometric line work combined with solid negative space. Palette consists of deep sapphire blues, cosmic violets, creamy off-white, and subtle metallic silver accents. Strong, graphic contrast, suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. Flat graphic design aesthetic, clean lines, symmetrical composition, perfect print resolution.
negative: photorealistic, 3d render, painting, blurry, low quality, poor anatomy, extra limbs, watermark, text, signature, noise, artifacts, cartoon, childish, messy, grainy
